horoscope: The Moon spends the day in your wishes, ideals, and friendship sector, dear Aries, stirring a need to feel hopeful and connected. It can also be a day with a lot of energy and animation surrounding a matter or a person from your past that has resurfaced. You could discover you have more energy to put something to rest or to deal with a nagging problem once and for all. A new piece of information, or a sudden memory, can make your mind race today, and there can be new insight into a matter. If you can harness the extra energy (mostly mental energy), you can be very productive today. There can be a desire to share something private or to release a mental burden, although you may want to double-check that you are not revealing something prematurely. Gather your facts before jumping into something. As Mercury is still retrograde and it aligns with your ruler in your sector of the subconscious and the past, frustration about a recent problem that's cropping up again can get the better of you. Try not to make hasty moves, both on physical and mental planes.

Good energy is with you today for recognizing your priorities, dear Taurus, or for dealing with your responsibilities. Personal and professional goals gain momentum, and you feel quite positive about what you can accomplish going forward. Others can notice you for your especially unique point of view or accurate observations today, and you can enjoy a nice feeling of invigoration and enthusiasm. Be aware that there can be a tendency to misconstrue or to put a lot of energy into something that you change your mind about later. As well, it can be especially important to pay attention to emotional cues, not just intellectual ones, and to avoid taking others' possibly insensitive commentary to heart. Otherwise, this can be an exciting day in which new visions and ideas are inspiring and light a fire under you. Conversations with friends or groups, and meetings in general, are animated. Look for friendship and expansion opportunities, but wait until later for brand new beginnings when Mercury is no longer retrograde and your retreat period is over.

You are more inclined to get moving, take action, and handle problem areas now than usual today, dear Gemini. Someone may be bringing out your more active, initiating qualities now, and encouraging you to go after what you want. You're communicating and coming across with considerable strength today. You're sure to find ways to improve your methods, but watch that you don't become completely wound up in a problem. An old problem that was put aside can now re-emerge, or you could feel driven to sort out a complicated issue. It would be nice to put something behind you once and for all, but watch for impatience and impulsive moves as Mars and retrograde Mercury come to an alignment.  Regrettable words and actions made now can be hard to live down later. Be firm and true to yourself in your dealings with others and take the high road if people are getting to you. You can experience a surge of motivation to handle problems or to resume an old project, but you may have far more ideas than time.

You're likely to be feeling more faith in your ability to get things done today, dear Cancer. A connection with someone can deepen today. A stronger feeling of purpose can energize you. This is a day of increased motivation and determination to get things done, or at the very least, to understand something more thoroughly. There is an extra dose of sharpness in your mental capacities now, and you're inclined to look to the past to examine problems or put something to rest. For the best results, focus on tying up loose ends. You can be quick to debate or defend an opinion or cause. Watch for too much living in the mind, however, as this can temporarily dull sensitivity to emotional cues. Be cautious about what you express, and if something said truly bothers you and causes your mind to race, try to wait before reacting, as the tendency to misinterpret runs high.

This is a good day for both getting along with others and getting things done, dear Leo. You seem to have energy to spare today, largely due to enthusiasm about what you can accomplish now and down the road. This is a good time to tackle projects or endeavors that you've let slide or that you've avoided in the past. There is mental courage to draw upon, more than usual, as well as a real desire to make things happen. There can be a competitive feeling today, and this can be used positively as motivation to make improvements. Restlessness might lead you to big discoveries, but it can also lead you down a frustrating path if you're not careful. Focus on existing problems now for the best results, rather than looking for new ones! Avoid pushing too hard for answers unless you're prepared to truly get them. Be firm and genuine in your dealings with others but avoid hasty words and moves.

There can be an accelerated, energized pace to a relationship today, dear Virgo, as well as animated or impulsive communications. Others may be reacting strongly or acting a little unpredictably. You could be revisiting an old problem, and this time finding answers to it, although it can feel a little too intense as you do so. An old relationship or significant person in your life can be in strong focus. You can be particularly focused on ideas or movement, and possibly both, but you may need to let your brain rest. Watch for hasty moves at this time, however, as you may feel you know the whole story, but there is more to come later.

An old problem or grievance, particularly work or health-related, can crop up today, demanding your attention, dear Libra. There can be a quickened pace to your routines and work, and you may feel a sudden desire to get busy, make a real difference, and sort out problem areas. It's a great time to find ways to reduce waste, as you are especially resourceful and can easily get to the point or bottom line. Mental energy is strong today, and you are best off using it to clear away clutter or otherwise clean up your life in small yet significant ways. Watch for sharp words, whether you're hearing or saying them. There is a business-like, slightly impatient quality to the day.

The urge to get cozy and comfortable is with you today, dear Scorpio. Familiar faces and places are soothing and therapeutic now. Even so, there can be animation surrounding romance, a friend, or a creative project today, with Mars and retrograde Mercury meeting up in a sector of your chart that rules these matters. There may be surprises or excitement now, a desire to get to the bottom of a matter, and a need to solve a problem from the past. You can get fired up about an interest or idea, and may be focusing on past ideas, projects, or even people. It's a strong day for feeling motivated to sort things out. An undeniable urge to express yourself in a creative, unique manner could take hold. As long as you avoid impulsive decisions or an overly competitive disposition, this can be a great day for increased motivation levels, making a real dent in your to-do list, and solving old problems.

This can be a good day for picking up where you left off on an old project, dear Sagittarius, particularly around the home or with family. Something from the past might resurface, and it can be refreshing as you uncover needs you have either denied or simply overlooked. Home may not exactly be your haven today, as it's likely to be quite busy and possibly hectic, and if you're away from home, it may be that your own brain feels overloaded or especially excitable. Prepare for changes in plans and some level of restlessness, but also a real chance to get things done. Conversations can be lively. A partner may be taking the lead today or energizing and encouraging you. The Moon spends the day in your communications sector, serving to heighten your curiosity and desire to diversify.

You speak with more passion today, dear Capricorn, and you may be quicker than usual to communicate. Of course, hasty communication can sometimes be regrettable, so you may want to watch for that, but you may very well enjoy the ability to make quicker decisions or handle a matter you've put aside. Mental energy runs high today, and it should be kept in mind that people may not be saying what's in their hearts. As such, it's better to keep some emotional distance when/if engaging in debates. There can be many distractions, but this can be a great day for reviving an old mental interest or idea. Dealing with blockages is possible. Aim to answer a desire to take care of business matters or to develop a talent.

This can be an energizing and motivating day, dear Aquarius. The Moon in your sign intensifies your emotions and heightens your awareness of your needs and desires. You can also feel quite motivated to put ideas into action, solve problems, and get things done, especially with your finances and business or practical matters. There may be a reason to defend yourself or to come to someone's defense on a mental level. You are a little more impulsive than usual, and decisions can be made quickly, ideally not hastily. This is a good time to revisit old ideas and perhaps update them. Review of past purchases or budgets can be fruitful. However, this isn't the time to go all in, since Mercury is still retrograde (until the 20th) and is currently aggravated by Mars, which is putting the pressure on and can lead to mistakes.

Good energy is with you for both catching up on your need for alone or private time, dear Pisces, and connecting with others. You can feel the need to get into touch with your deeper feelings on a matter. However, mental energy is abundant today, and while it can sometimes cross over the line of excess, you can get a lot done with it if you handle it well. The desire to build something for yourself or to take action on your ideas can be powerful now, and you are more willing to do what it takes to make things happen. You may want to watch for impulsive or unintentionally insensitive remarks, as your mind is working a lot faster than your heart, and at a quicker pace than that of most people around you. Of course, you can blurt something out and immediately prepare yourself for damage control. However, you may decide to consider consequences first and save yourself the trouble. There can be some backtracking or frustration now that serves as a push to clear the decks for new beginnings. Try not to make hasty moves or communications now, as Mercury is still retrograde in your sign (until the 20th), and you don't yet have all the information or resources to push forward.
